nodes.name: Andrew Smith (zoologist)
nodes.summary: Andrew Smith (zoologist)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括Swainson's spurfowl、Swamp nightjar、African barred owlet等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 史瓦帝尼
nodes.summary: 史瓦帝尼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括Shelley's francolin、Natal spurfowl、Swainson's spurfowl等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Fan-tailed widowbird
nodes.summary: Fan-tailed widowbird（Fan-tailed widowbird，学名 Euplectes axillaris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: phoeniceus | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Euplectes | species = axillaris | authority = (Smith, 1838) | synonyms = }} The fan-tailed widowbird (Euplectes axillaris), also known as the red-shouldered widowbird, is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae, which is native to grassy and swampy areas of the tropical and subtropical Afrotropics

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Angola, Botswana, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Republic of the Congo, DRC, Eswatini, Ethiopia, Kenya, Lesotho, Malawi, Mali, Mozambique, Namibia, Niger, Nigeria, Rwanda, Somalia, South Africa, Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe
